dashboard.label: SOC 2 Compliance Evidence
dashboard.description: Automated compliance evidence generation — query, don't audit

search.query: `corvus_events` | stats count as total count(eval(status_id=1 OR "unmapped.outcome"="success")) as success | eval rate=round(success/total*100, 1) | fields rate

`corvus_events` class_uid=6002 | stats count as total count(eval(status_id=1)) as success count(eval(status_id!=1)) as failed by "unmapped.source" | eval pass_rate=round(success/total*100, 1) | sort - total | rename "unmapped.source" as Agent

`corvus_incidents` | stats count(eval(activity_name="Create")) as opened count(eval(activity_name="Update")) as investigated count(eval(activity_name="Close")) as resolved count(eval(activity_name="Other")) as escalated | eval resolution_rate=round(resolved/opened*100, 1)
`corvus_incidents` activity_name="Close" | spath "unmapped.resolution_time_minutes" | stats avg("unmapped.resolution_time_minutes") as avg_mttr | eval avg_mttr=round(avg_mttr, 0)

`corvus_changes` | stats count(eval(activity_name="Execute")) as started count(eval("unmapped.outcome"="success")) as succeeded count(eval("unmapped.outcome"="failure")) as failed | eval success_rate=round(succeeded/(succeeded+failed)*100, 1)

`corvus_remediation` | spath "unmapped.action_type" | spath "unmapped.trust_tier" | stats count by "unmapped.action_type" "unmapped.trust_tier" "unmapped.outcome" | rename "unmapped.action_type" as Action "unmapped.trust_tier" as "Trust Tier" "unmapped.outcome" as Outcome | sort Action

`corvus_events` | sort - _time | table _time class_name activity_name "unmapped.source" "unmapped.target" status_id "unmapped.severity" | rename "unmapped.source" as Agent "unmapped.target" as Target "unmapped.severity" as Severity | head 100
